title: Rivers Forget
meta_description: Discover the secrets of a legendary river

prompts.featured: A wide-angle landscape shot of a serene river flowing through a small village, with a misty mountain range in the background, and a few villagers gathered at the riverbank, surrounded by lush greenery and vibrant flowers, with a warm golden light casting a sense of peace and tranquility
prompts.thumbnail: A close-up shot of the young apprentice standing at the riverbank, looking out at the water with a contemplative expression, with a few strands of hair blowing gently in the wind, and a small wooden boat in the background, with a soft focus effect to emphasize the apprentice's introspective mood
prompts.pinterest: A vertical image featuring a dramatic, high-contrast visual of the river at sunset, with the words 'When Rivers Forget' overlaid in a elegant, cursive font, and a few subtle texture effects to give the image a sense of depth and organic feel, with a call-to-action to 'Discover the secrets of the legendary river' in a smaller, yet still prominent, font
